## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I ran `make security`.
- [ ] I ran `make test`.
- [ ] This PR does not add unapproved external URLs.
- [ ] This PR does not add telemetry, tracking pixels, credential forms, or hidden network requests.
- [ ] Destructive behavior previews first or requires explicit confirmation.
- [ ] Protected-path handling is unchanged or covered by tests.
- [ ] Sudo/admin authorization changes are explained below, or this PR does not touch them.

## Security Notes

Mention any changes involving deletion, trash/restore, sudo/admin authorization, shell commands, launch agents, app uninstall, network behavior, or generated assets.
